instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger kickdown when the accelerator pedal is pressed aggressively.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Throttle_Position exceeds Kickdown_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Kickdown_Threshold AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent kickdown when engine speed exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject kickdown when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable kickdown during high throttle rate increase.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger kickdown when throttle rate exceeds Rate_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Rate > Rate_Threshold AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Kickdown_Speed THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable kickdown during Eco mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject kickdown when Driving_Mode equals Eco.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode = Eco AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable kickdown only above minimum vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger kickdown when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Min_Kickdown_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Kickdown_Speed AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger kickdown during full throttle operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Throttle_Position equals Maximum.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position = Maximum AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent kickdown when gear shift is already in progress.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject kickdown when Gear_Shift_In_Progress equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Shift_In_Progress = TRUE AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable kickdown during transmission faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit kickdown when Transmission_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault = TRUE AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger kickdown only when throttle signal is valid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable kickdown when Throttle_Signal_Valid equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Signal_Valid = FALSE AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable kickdown only when engine load is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger kickdown when Engine_Load exceeds Load_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load > Load_Threshold AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Kickdown_Speed THEN Trigger_Downshift
